title: thuja macrolepis
intro: Thuja macrolepis, also known as the Himalayan cedar or Himalayan white cedar, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thuja macrolepis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, as well as being used to treat digestive problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Thuja macrolepis include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be made by infusing the leaves and branches in hot water or oil.
